LITIGATION CASE FILE SUMMARY
Matter ID: LIT-2026-087
Case: Apex Supply Co. v. Meridian Bank, N.A.
Court: Superior Court of California, County of Los Angeles
Case No.: 26STCV10482
Case Type: Commercial contract dispute
Plaintiffs: Apex Supply Co.
Defendants: Meridian Bank, N.A.; Meridian Commercial Finance LLC
Client Role: Defendant
Lead Counsel: Andrea Wolfe
Law Firm: Wolfe & Kim LLP
Initial Filing Date: 2026-02-11
Next Deadline: July 15, 2026 - opposition to motion for preliminary injunction
Claims: breach of contract; negligent misrepresentation; unfair business practices
Key Motions: motion for preliminary injunction pending; demurrer filed
Discovery Status: written discovery served, document production in progress
Hearings: 2026-07-29 preliminary injunction hearing; 2026-09-04 case management conference
Settlement Status: mediation scheduled, no demand accepted
Exposure: $8,500,000
Case Status: Open
